titleStmt.title: SII 16.76: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 76. (A.R. No. 413 of 1919.) LITTLE KĀÑCHĪPURAM, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLPEUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south side of the rock in the Aruḷāḷa-Perumāḷ temple.
This record, in a single line, is dated Śaka 1446, Tāraṇa, Mārgaśīrsha ba. 11, Monday, Śravaṇa. The Śaka and cyclic year quoted correspond to 1524 A.D. But the other details are irregular.
It records the gift of a pendant inset with precious stones by Rāyasam Śrīpataya on behalf of the king.
The record also contains details of provisions made for offerings to the god while the diety camped at Kāñchi for 36 days.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: śubhamastu . svastiśrī vijayābhyudeya śālivāhana śakavaruṣālu . 1446 Agunēṭi tāraṇa saṁvatsara mā¨rgaśira bahuḷa 11 sōma śravaṇānanu śrīman®mahārājādhirāja rājapara mēśvara muvarāyaragaṁḍa Ariyarāya vibhāḍa Aṣṭadikurāyamanōbhayaṁkara bhāśegatappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pū¨rvadakṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhīśvara yavanna rājyastāpanā cā¨ryya gajapativibhāḍa śrī vīra . patāpa śrī vīra kruṣṇudēvamahārāyala rāyasaṁ śrīpataya mā kaiṁkaryaṁ varadarājadēvuniki sama¨rpiṁcina padakamokaṁṭiki keṁpulu 9 vaiḍūryālu 2 vajrālu 20 pacca māṇikyālu 8 mutyālu 4 Aṁturāḷu mutyālu 43 vomasaṁlaka nūlu saha tūṁkālu 24 Ayina padakaṁ sama¨rpiṁcina dha¨rmaṁ śrīpatayyaku Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāyigānu naḍacunu yaṁmā darivrālu kaṁciki perumāḷu viccēsi dinālu 36 yī dinālu mupayyārunnu dēvuṁḍu tirigi viccēsi Apuḍu tirupaḷyaralōnu viccēsi Uṁḍi Āragiṁcanu śēśina kaṭṭaḍa tiruṇāḷa kaṁṭiki dinamokaṁṭiki rājanapu biyyaṁ tūmeṁḍuṁnu neya sōleḍunu pesalu taveṁḍunu bellaṁ sōleṁḍunu kariyamudulu nālugunu nayivēdyaṁgānu sama¨rpiṁci yī prasādaṁ viṭavan® viḷukāḍu saha nālugu va ga lōnu pucukōṁgalavāru yī dha¨rmaṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyi gānu naḍavaṁgalavāraṁ śrī . yive guḍikaraṇaṁ tiruvatūruḍayaṁḍu varaṁdaruṁperu māḷu Apayyavrālu . There is a blank space of about 4 feet here.
Digital edition of SII 16.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
